results.releaseNotes: The new Yahoo Mail experience includes features designed to simplify your life including AI-powered capabilities, making it easier to help stay organized, in touch and on top of your inbox. Now, never miss a moment with Planner.
results.description:
YAHOO MAIL: THE SMART INBOX DESIGNED TO SIMPLIFY YOUR LIFE 
Yahoo Mail is the ultimate smart inbox and advanced email organizer, built to simplify your life and get more done in less time. It’s simple to use, lightning fast, and features top-notch security to keep your account secure and your privacy protected against spam and phishing.

NEW: NEVER MISS WHAT MATTERS WITH PLANNER 
Stop digging through your inbox and start staying ahead. Whether it’s a flight confirmation, a dinner reservation, or a bill due date, the new Planner feature automatically surfaces your important events and tasks in one clear, unified view. Yahoo Mail is solving "inbox overwhelm" by turning your messages into an actionable plan, so you can feel in control and never miss a thing.

HOW PLANNER SIMPLIFIES YOUR DAY:
- Your Entire Day in One App: Stop switching between screens. Planner integrates your mail, events, and tasks into a single experience, so you never have to leave Yahoo Mail to manage your life.
- Personal planner for Your Pocket: Easily organize and view events and to-dos from your email. Whether you’re a busy parent or a professional on the go, staying productive has never been this seamless.
- One-Tap Organization: Swipe and tap "Add to Planner" to instantly add a task or event from any email.
- A Unified View: See your reservations, and upcoming plans side-by-side, including your existing Gmail calendar.
- Smart Extraction: No more manual entry. Planner finds the details for you, creating a productivity hub within your mobile-first workflow.

ORDERS HUB: REAL-TIME PACKAGE TRACKING & RECEIPTS 
Never lose track of an order again. Yahoo Mail automatically surfaces your tracking numbers and delivery updates at the top of your inbox so you stay informed from checkout to front porch.

- Track Packages: View the live status and ETA of your shipments with real-time package tracking, without searching for confirmation emails.
- Find Receipts Instantly: Orders Hub automatically groups and organizes your receipts and orders for easy access when you need them most, perfect for expense reporting, tracking returns, or simply keeping a tab on your spending habits.

AI-POWERED FEATURES TO REVOLUTIONIZE YOUR INBOX
Do more and email less with intelligent, AI-powered features designed to save you time:

- AI Summaries: Instantly catch up with summaries of long emails that highlight key takeaways and action items immediately.
- AI Compose & Tone Assist: Write better emails that strike the right tone every time—professional, casual, or friendly.
- Quick Actions: Complete important actions like scheduling or checking in with a single tap.

INDUSTRY-LEADING FREE EMAIL STORAGE
Never worry about running out of space. Yahoo Mail comes with 20 GB of free storage, so you can keep the memories and messages that matter most.

TOP-NOTCH SECURITY & PRIVACY
- Built-In Spam Detection: Sophisticated filters work silently to block spam and phishing attempts.
- One-Tap Unsubscribe: Effortlessly opt out of unwanted mailing lists and newsletters to declutter your inbox instantly.
- Delete By Sender: Bulk-delete all messages from a single sender in one tap to win back your storage.

POWERFUL ORGANIZATION FOR REAL LIFE
- Universal Account Access: Sync accounts like Gmail, Outlook, and AOL to manage all your messages in one powerful, unified inbox. By connecting your accounts, you bring Yahoo smart organization—like real-time package tracking—to every email you receive, no matter the provider.
- Catch Up Faster: Review unread emails in a fast, satisfying format that lets you keep or delete with zero effort.
- Primary Inbox: Automatically see your most crucial updates first, filtering out the distracting noise.
